reasoning: Source code analysis of buggy commit 4daad6679d confirms the bug. In styles.css, the sidebar board list container (.boardConfigModalSidebarBtnArea) lacks overflow-y:scroll and max-height constraints. When many boards are created, the list overflows the visible area with no scrollbar, making boards and the bottom 'Add Board' button inaccessible. The fix commit 296eeab2c2 adds overflow-y:scroll and max-height:calc(var(--dialog-max-height) - 30dvh) to the board list container, and separates the bottom button area into a new class (.boardConfigModalSidebarBtnAreaConfigBtnsSection) so buttons remain fixed while the list scrolls.
evidence: Buggy styles.css line ~1782: .boardConfigModalSidebarBtnArea has flex-direction:column, gap:0.5em, width:100% but NO overflow-y or max-height. Fix adds overflow-y:scroll and max-height:calc(var(--dialog-max-height) - 30dvh). Also in BoardConfigModal.tsx line 758: button area div className changed from boardConfigModalSidebarBtnArea to boardConfigModalSidebarBtnAreaConfigBtnsSection to separate scrollable list from fixed buttons.
mano_cua_outcome: Skipped — Obsidian plugin, cannot run standalone in browser. Bug confirmed via source code diff.
